content_body:
We have been looking forward to visiting "A River's Bend" cabin since we stayed here 2 years ago. We enjoyed sharing this experience with our 3-year old and 10.5 month old. While visiting, we went to the Southern Plantation Tree Farm where our 3-year old rode a pony, roasted marshmallows, and went on a hayride. We also visited a few of our favorite places - Mercier's Orchard, Burt's Farm, and Amicalola Lodge. During our stay, we enjoyed sitting outside relaxing. We even carved a pumpkin, made s'mores by the campfire, played a game of Candyland and had many picnics. Both of our girls loved the tent in the basement! It nice to spend quality time as a family. The basement turned out so beautiful! We really enjoyed reading the guest books. It was fun to see what others had enjoyed after our stay last time. It was exciting to see that the couple who stayed here right after us last time got engaged in front of the fireplace! Thank you for yet another memorable visit to your beautiful cabin.
FL
title: Returning Family Vacation in Blue Ridge
